name: Applesauce Granola Cookies (Sugar-free)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons frozen concentrated apple juice, unsweetened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat together eggs, oil, applesauce, and apple juice concentrate.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and spices. Beat well.
3. Mix in granola.
4. Drop batter by teaspoons onto oiled baking sheets.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 7 to 10 minutes or until firm to the touch and bottoms are browned.
6. Cool on wire racks.
